Operation 'ListUsername' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary uses generic 'Retrieve' language. Description lacks specificity about what is returned and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies that this retrieves the authenticated user's username, specifies the return format, and explicitly states no modifications occur - improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: **This endpoint allows you to retrieve your current account username.**
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the username associated with the authenticated user's SendGrid account. Returns the current username as a string. This operation requires valid API key authentication and does not modify any account settings.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses generic 'Retrieve' language. Description lacks specificity about what is returned and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies that this retrieves the authenticated user's username, specifies the return format, and explicitly states no modifications occur - improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'UpdateUsername' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too vague about inputs (what format/constraints for new username), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (immediate effect on credentials). Enhanced description specifies request body requirements, return value, immediate effect, and access implications for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: **This endpoint allows you to update the username for your account.**
data.description_suggestion: Updates the username for the authenticated user's SendGrid account. Requires a new username in the request body. Returns the updated user profile with the new username. This change takes effect immediately and may affect account access credentials. Only the account owner can modify their username.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too vague about inputs (what format/constraints for new username), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (immediate effect on credentials). Enhanced description specifies request body requirements, return value, immediate effect, and access implications for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description:
**This endpoint allows you to retrieve your user account details.**

Your user's account information includes the user's account type and reputation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's account details including account type and reputation metrics. Returns a UserProfile object containing the current account information. Requires Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: The description is somewhat vague about what is returned. Added clarity about the response schema (UserProfile object), authentication requirement, and specific fields returned (account type and reputation) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description:
**This endpoint allows you to update your current profile details.**

Any one or more of the parameters can be updated via the PATCH `/user/profile` endpoint. You must include at least one when you PATCH.
data.description_suggestion: Updates one or more fields in the authenticated user's profile. Supports partial updates via PATCH - only provided fields will be modified. Requires at least one field in the request body. Returns the updated UserProfile object. Changes take effect immediately. Requires Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description mentions partial update capability but lacks clarity about response format and side effects. Added details about response schema (UserProfile object), that changes are immediate, and authentication requirement. Improved phrasing for better AI agent interpretability.
